ul.li:
Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
CodeDisplay
joint_painJoint or Bone Pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE09Pain or Difficulty Passing Urine or Crying when Passing Urine
EmCare.B12S1.DE10Skin Problem
EmCare.B12S1.DE11Ear Pain
EmCare.B12S1.DE12Other
no_painNo Pain

title.value: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth

description.value: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

value.value: The client is reported to have or has had joint or bone pain

display.value: Pain or Difficulty Passing Urine or Crying when Passing Urine

value.value: The client is reported to have or has had pain or difficulty passing urine or crying when passing urine
The client is reported to have or is observed to have skin pain or problem
The client is reported to have or has had ear pain
The client is reported to have or has had another type of pain
The client is reported to have no pain
